taxonomy.literalName: Brake Hydraulic System Drain, Refill & Bleed

notes.text: Service at least once every year.
Do not rotate staggered tires from front to back. If tires are asymmetric(directional), do not rotate side to side. Follow all OEM tire rotation recommendations and pattern.
Service at least once every year.
Check front and rear lights, Luggage Compartment Lighting, Turn Signals, Hazard Warning Lights, Daytime Running Lights, Curve Lighting, and Automatic Headlights.

taxonomy.literalName: Brake Hydraulic System Fluid Level Inspect
